notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page seems to have lost its way.
notFound.reassurance: No worries, we'll get you back on track.

hero.description: Toko helps parents track the symptoms and daily life of their ADHD child. Clear data for informed decisions with healthcare professionals.
hero.noCard: Free to start. No credit card required.

features.title: Everything to support your child
features.subtitle: Tools designed by parents, for parents.

symptoms.title: Symptom tracking
symptoms.description: Assess your child daily on 5 dimensions: restlessness, focus, impulsivity, mood, sleep.

journal.title: Observation journal
journal.description: Record notable daily events with thematic tags (school, crisis, victory…).

crisis.title: Crisis list
crisis.description: Build a list of calming activities with your child, viewable in full-screen mode during crises.

rewards.title: Reward chart
rewards.description: Track target behaviors week after week and unlock rewards with earned stars.

barkley.title: Barkley program (PEHP)
barkley.description: Progress through the 10 steps of the validated parent training program, with a quiz at each step.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Visualize trends over week, month, or quarter, and identify the patterns that matter.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade to Family when you're ready.

login.tagline: The app that helps parents guide their ADHD child, one day at a time.
login.name: Name
login.demoHint: Demo account pre-filled — Premium access included

contact.title: Contact
contact.contactUsBody: For any question, suggestion, or request about Toko, feel free to contact us by email.
contact.rightsBody: In accordance with the GDPR, you can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, and portability of your data by writing to the address above. We commit to responding within 30 days.
contact.reportBody: If you encounter a bug or technical issue, please report it by email with the most precise steps to reproduce.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.editorBody: Toko is a web application published on a personal basis.
legal.hostingBody: This site is hosted by cloud hosting services. Data is stored on secure servers.
legal.ipBody: All content on this site (text, images, graphics, logo, icons) is the exclusive property of the publisher, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, modification, or adaptation of all or part of the site is forbidden without prior authorization.
legal.personalDataBody1: Data collected through this application is used only within the scope of the tracking provided by Toko. No personal data is sold or transmitted to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.personalDataBody2: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have a right of access, rectification, erasure, and portability of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us.
legal.cookiesBody: This site uses cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the application (authentication, session). No advertising tracking cookies are used.
legal.liabilityBody: Toko is a tracking aid tool and in no way constitutes medical advice. Information provided by the application does not replace a consultation with a healthcare professional. The publisher cannot be held responsible for any use made of the information on this site.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.introBody: Toko is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This privacy policy describes the data we collect, how we use it, and the measures we take to protect it.
privacy.collectedAccountBody: email address and name, when you create your account.
privacy.collectedTrackingBody: symptoms and journal notes you enter in the application.
privacy.collectedTechnicalBody: session cookies required for the application to work.
privacy.usageIntro: Your data is used exclusively to:
privacy.usage1: Provide the tracking features of the application.
privacy.usage2: Generate reports and statistics visible only to you.
privacy.usage3: Improve the operation and reliability of the service.
privacy.sharingBody: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Your health tracking data remains strictly confidential.
privacy.securityBody: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction. Connections are encrypted and passwords are hashed.
privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.rightAccessBody: obtain a copy of your personal data.
privacy.rightDeleteBody: request the deletion of your data.
privacy.rightPortabilityBody: receive your data in a structured, readable format.
privacy.rightObjectBody: object to the processing of your data.
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise these rights, please contact us via the contact page.
privacy.retentionBody: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, all your personal data will be removed from our servers.
privacy.updatesBody: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Start by adding your child to begin tracking.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Daily tracking overview
dashboard.inactivityBody: Remember to log today's symptoms to keep your streak.
